blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: Hoho. Is this really a human's fist?
A punch rivaling magic in power. And it wasn't just a single strike.
Etella, holding her breath, unleashed a barrage.
Each blow to the dense darkness made her wrists ache, but the golem's pain was far greater.
Arcane gritted his teeth and steadied his mind.
Etella's punches weren't just powerful—their impact was unique.
Instead of breaking the surface, they generated shockwaves internally.
The problem was the interference from overlapping waves.

blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: Wave-type attacks. This is dangerous.
Grrraaaah!
As the dark golem writhed, Etella's eyes flashed.
Stepping in, she struck its solar plexus with her palm.
A massive ripple spread, triggering roughly 400 interference effects—400 times stronger than her fist's impact.
The golem convulsed as if it had swallowed a bomb, its black body swelling.
It was on the verge of exploding.

blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: Grrrrr!
Arcane grimaced, straining to hold on.
If his Spirit Zone broke, the golem would collapse.
As the golem's tremors subsided, Etella bit her lip.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: Still not enough? I should've stacked more waves.
The Yin-Yang Wave Fist used ripple waves, stacking them in the opponent's body before delivering a final, explosive strike.
Though it took time to reach peak power, the resulting impact was terrifying.
But Arcane endured.
The golem had withstood 400 times a Schema fist's force, but an archmage's mental strength was no joke.

blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: Impressive, little one.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: Next time, it won't end like this. Give up now.

blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: Kekeke! You've still got fight left. Good. It's been a while since I've warmed up properly.
Arcane raised his hand, and the dark spiders merged into the golem.
Growing rapidly, it soon pierced the forest canopy.
Etella felt dizzy.
This was the true form of Arcane's infamous dark golem—capable of destroying a small city in days.

blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: How's this for impressive? Keep pounding with your wave fist. My golem's abyss is deeper than the sea.
A golem over 10 meters tall made wave propagation questionable.
But Etella clenched her fist until it might shatter.
She would become the world's light, even if it meant death.
Grrraaaah!
The golem stomped forward.
Despite its size, its speed was unchanged.
Moving at the speed of thought was why Dark Minions were classified as overpowered.
Boom!
The golem's fist smashed where Etella stood.
Seismic waves toppled trees, and the ground churned as if hundreds of moles were tunneling.
Boom! Boom! Boom!
Fists rained down, shaking the earth and devastating the surroundings.
As the sixth strike landed, Etella pivoted, running up the golem's arm.
Reaching its shoulder, she crossed her arms and leaped down.
During the fall, fists too fast to see pummeled the golem.
Drrrrrrrrr!
The Yin-Yang Wave Fist's ultimate technique—Thousand-Armed Avalanche Thunder Strike.

blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: Grrrr!
Sparks flared endlessly in Arcane's brain.
Over 30 shocks per second flooded in.
At 300 ripples per second, a 2-second fall would unleash 600 ripples—3,000 interference effects.
But the technique's essence lay in the final palm strike.
If it landed, the interference count would reach… '68,000.'
A force 68,000 times Etella's punch would explode internally.
Arcane's hair stood on end, but his lips curled into a grotesque smile.

blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: Kekeke! This feels like the old days.
He had no intention of fleeing.
If the enemy was strong, he'd crush them with greater force.
How he'd missed this moment.
The glory of clashing with countless geniuses flashed through his mind.
Grrraaaah!
The golem twisted like a pretzel.
Etella, landing, pulled her hands to her sides.
The final strike—Thunderclap Palm—gathered in her palms.
As the golem's rotating fist descended, she gritted her teeth and thrust her palms forward.
Whoooooosh!
A mushroom cloud rose from the mountainside.
Trees within 20 meters were uprooted, turning the lush forest into a wasteland.
Stars twinkled in the night sky.
Etella blinked at the starlight filtering through the branches.
How much time had passed?
Or how far had she been flung?
Every tree along her path was broken.
At the end of the devastation, Etella lay sprawled, unable to move a finger.
Her muscles twitched involuntarily.
Her fingertips and toes were numb.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: Master…….

blocks.speaker: Arcane
blocks.content: Archmages are truly strong.
Even her ultimate technique couldn't stop Arcane's Dark Minions.
Was this the power of a calamitous spell?
Guilt gnawed at her for failing to vanquish evil.
If only she'd stacked more waves, mastered the technique perfectly, or amplified the Thunderclap Palm's power.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: Hic. Sob…….
Etella covered her eyes with trembling hands.
Hot tears streamed down like a waterfall.

blocks.speaker: Etella
blocks.content: I'm sorry, Master.
Her sobs echoed through the mountains.
